query:
INSERT INTO `complaintCategories` (`name`, `description`, `icon`, `color`) VALUES
('Maintenance', 'Building and facility maintenance issues', 'wrench', '#3B82F6'),
('Security', 'Security and safety concerns', 'shield', '#EF4444'),
('Utilities', 'Water, electricity, and utility issues', 'zap', '#F59E0B'),
('Cleanliness', 'Cleaning and hygiene issues', 'sparkles', '#10B981');

INSERT INTO `complaints` (`tenantId`, `categoryId`, `title`, `description`, `status`, `priority`, `attachmentUrls`, `createdAt`) VALUES
(1, 1, 'Broken Door Lock', 'The main entrance door lock is broken and needs immediate repair', 'pending', 'high', '[]', NOW()),
(1, 2, 'Suspicious Activity', 'Noticed suspicious activity near the back entrance', 'in_progress', 'urgent', '[]', NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY),
(1, 3, 'No Hot Water', 'Hot water supply is not working in room 101', 'resolved', 'high', '[]', NOW() - INTERVAL 5 DAY),
(1, 4, 'Common Area Dirty', 'The common area needs urgent cleaning', 'pending', 'medium', '[]', NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
